title: Fusion's Beryl Blue
description: Another one of my PvP texture packs! Has a more blue theme.
body:
A blue-themed Crystal PvP texture pack. Items, blocks, and armor have been changed. End crystals and Anchors are now blue and the enchantment glint has been changed. This was one of the more early-made packs that I made a year or two ago. 

If increased support of the pack I might update it to be better.
